metadata.title:
PLANT SUSAN B. ANTHONY
TREE IN SPITE OF


OPPOSITION.

SET OUT STURDY OAK

NORTH CENTRAL HIGH SCHOOL
HONORED BY LOCAL


SUFFRAGETTES.

pages.raw_text:
Brave women have seen that
the memory of Susan 3. Anthony
dear to the hearts of all suf-
fragettes, is not overlooked in Spo.
kane.


1t was planned to plant a tree
in honor of Miss Anthony on tho
grounds of the North Central high
school last night, but the inter
ference of the school authorities,
who wanted to plant tree for
some other purpose, prevented this
being consummated.


Last night at 10 o'clock a party
of stout feminine hearts went to
the school and while the school Of
icials were reposing in restful
siumbcr set out sturdy oak tree
in honor of the great woman that
did so much for the cause OF equal
suffrage.


When the school authorities
thought they had the women
bluffed, and that the suffragettes
had cold feet and would not re-
turn. they tailed to count the valor
of their fair foes. When women
set their heads to do anything
they generally win out, soonor or
later. and the Susan b. Anthony
tree is no exception to the rule.


This might be taken as hint
by Police Chief Sullivan to get
good and withdraw his fight on
police matrons before it is too
late.
